'''dhomawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgar|vulgar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgar|vulgar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhomawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhomawithi|dhomawithi]] || [[word:dhomawiji|dhomawiji]] || [[word:dhomawishi|dhomawishi]] || [[word:dhomawiki|dhomawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhomawuthu|dhomawuthu]] || [[word:dhomawuju|dhomawuju]] || [[word:dhomawushu|dhomawushu]] || [[word:dhomawuku|dhomawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhomawuthu|dhomawuthu]] || [[word:dhomawuju|dhomawuju]] || [[word:dhomawushu|dhomawushu]] || [[word:dhomawuku|dhomawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhomawufthuf|dhomawufthuf]] || [[word:dhomawufjuf|dhomawufjuf]] || [[word:dhomawufshuf|dhomawufshuf]] || [[word:dhomawufkuf|dhomawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhomawethe|dhomawethe]] || [[word:dhomaweje|dhomaweje]] || [[word:dhomaweshe|dhomaweshe]] || [[word:dhomaweke|dhomaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhomawotho|dhomawotho]] || [[word:dhomawojo|dhomawojo]] || [[word:dhomawosho|dhomawosho]] || [[word:dhomawoko|dhomawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhomawotho|dhomawotho]] || [[word:dhomawojo|dhomawojo]] || [[word:dhomawosho|dhomawosho]] || [[word:dhomawoko|dhomawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhomawofthof|dhomawofthof]] || [[word:dhomawofjof|dhomawofjof]] || [[word:dhomawofshof|dhomawofshof]] || [[word:dhomawofkof|dhomawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf|dhomawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhomawĂŠthĂŠ|dhomawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhomawĂŠjĂŠ|dhomawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhomawĂŠshĂŠ|dhomawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhomawĂŠkĂŠ|dhomawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhomawatha|dhomawatha]] || [[word:dhomawaja|dhomawaja]] || [[word:dhomawasha|dhomawasha]] || [[word:dhomawaka|dhomawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhomawatha|dhomawatha]] || [[word:dhomawaja|dhomawaja]] || [[word:dhomawasha|dhomawasha]] || [[word:dhomawaka|dhomawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhomawafthaf|dhomawafthaf]] || [[word:dhomawafjaf|dhomawafjaf]] || [[word:dhomawafshaf|dhomawafshaf]] || [[word:dhomawafkaf|dhomawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhomawasha|dhomawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhomawshĂ«asha|dhomawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhomawroasha|dhomawroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhomawmuasha|dhomawmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhomawyaasha|dhomawyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhomawnkshĂ«asha|godhomawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhomawnkroasha|godhomawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhomawnkmuasha|godhomawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhomawnkyaasha|godhomawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhomamawasha|dhomamawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhomamawshĂ«asha|dhomamawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhomamawroasha|dhomamawroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhomamawmuasha|dhomamawmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhomamawyaasha|dhomamawyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhomamawnkshĂ«asha|godhomamawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhomamawnkroasha|godhomamawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhomamawnkmuasha|godhomamawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhomamawnkyaasha|godhomamawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhemĂŠwasha|dhemĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhemĂŠwshĂ«asha|dhemĂŠwshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhemĂŠwroasha|dhemĂŠwroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhemĂŠwmuasha|dhemĂŠwmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhemĂŠwyaasha|dhemĂŠwyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhemĂŠwnkshĂ«asha|godhemĂŠwnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhemĂŠwnkroasha|godhemĂŠwnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhemĂŠwnkmuasha|godhemĂŠwnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhemĂŠwnkyaasha|godhemĂŠwnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhomfawasha|dhomfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhomfawshĂ«asha|dhomfawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhomfawroasha|dhomfawroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhomfawmuasha|dhomfawmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhomfawyaasha|dhomfawyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhomfawnkshĂ«asha|godhomfawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhomfawnkroasha|godhomfawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhomfawnkmuasha|godhomfawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhomfawnkyaasha|godhomfawnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
